anti_ai_rules: Never use 'I am excited to share'
Never use perfect bullet-point structure in every post
Occasionally use contractions and informal language
Include specific details like exact hours, numbers, file names
Allow mild frustration or vulnerability in tone

image_settings.image_style: realistic, professional, tech-themed, modern workspace or code on screen
